name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in NewCredentials Logons
notes:
This building block detects the attack technique pass the hash which is used to move laterally inside the network.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Dave Kennedy, Jeff Warren (method) / David Vassallo (rule)
SIGMA Title: Pass the Hash Activity 2
SIGMA Description: Detects the attack technique pass the hash which is used to move laterally inside the network


Confidence: HIGH

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in NewCredentials Logons on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000830) Success Audit: An account was successfully logged on
when the event matches Logon Type (custom) is any of 9
when the event matches Logon Process (custom) is any of seclogo
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Pass the Hash Activity in NewCredentials Logons on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000830) Success Audit: An account was successfully logged on
AND when the event matches Logon Type (custom) is any of 9
AND when the event matches Logon Process (custom) is any of seclogo
